results.title: Watch: Gill shares a heartwarming moment with parents after GT reach Final
results.description: Shubman Gill's spectacular century powered Gujarat Titans to a record-breaking chase in IPL 2026 Qualifier 2, securing their spot in the final. He was celebrated with his family after the thrilling 7-wicket victory over Rajasthan Royals. The Titans now head to Ahmedabad to face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a highly anticipated title clash.
